description: R3a-4 dep-artifact payload + consumer-hook goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. The golden captures BOTH the dep artifact producer payloads (intraAppCallEdges / citedOperationEvidence / depOrderIndex + stamp) AND the consumed effect (injected typedEdges + citedDepOperationEvidence + depRoutineOrderEntries / depReturnSummaries) from the R3a-4 cross-app fixture (a source-bearing dep with an intra-dep call chain). Capture point: post-injectIntraAppCallEdges / collectCitedDepEvidence / collectDepOrderIndex. See scripts/r3a4-projection.ts.
capturePoint: post-hooks (indexWorkspace → resolveDependencyArtifacts(noDepSummaries:false) → withDependencyArtifacts → resolveModel → buildCombinedGraph → injectIntraAppCallEdges → collectCitedDepEvidence → collectDepOrderIndex)
note: R3a-4 captures the dep-artifact L4 payload surfaces + consumer hooks. EXCLUDED: the full cross-app L4 summary (R3a-5 — the cone propagating dep facts to primary callers). The fixture uses a source-bearing dep (includesSource:true) with an intra-dep call chain (DoIt→DoWrite→Insert) to ensure nonzero payloads.

matrix.note: The cross-app corpus uses symbol-only deps (R2.5b) and a source-bearing chain dep (R3a-4). Symbol-only deps produce intraAppCallEdges=0, citedEvidence=0, depOrderIndex=absent (no parsed bodies). The chain dep (includesSource:true, DoIt→DoWrite→Insert) is the non-hollow fixture that exercises all three payload surfaces. Under noDepSummaries:true (R2.5b captures), depOrderIndex is structurally absent — this is expected and documented. R3a-4 runs with noDepSummaries:false.
